name: Kippo2ElasticSearch
description: Python script to transfer data from a Kippo SSH honeypot MySQL database to an ElasticSearch instance (server or cluster). Tool: https://bruteforcelab.com/kippo2elasticsearch. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #462 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Kippo2ElasticSearch output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Kippo2ElasticSearch output file to parse instead of running it live.
